message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle bold
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam classBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam classHeaderFontColor #000000
skinparam classHeaderBorderSize 0
skinparam classHeaderAlignment center
skinparam classAttributeFontStyle plain
skinparam classAttributeFontColor #000000
skinparam classMethodFontStyle plain
skinparam classMethodFontColor #000000
skinparam classMethodAlignment left
skinparam classAttributeAlignment left
skinparam classMethodAlignment left
skinparam classAttributePadding 5
skinparam classMethodPadding 5
skinparam classHeaderPadding 5
skinparam classPadding 5
skinparam classMargin 10
skinparam classBorderSize 1
skinparam classHeaderBorderSize 0
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam classHeaderFontColor #000000
skinparam classHeaderAlignment center
skinparam classAttributeFontStyle plain
skinparam classAttributeFontColor #000000
skinparam classMethodFontStyle plain
skinparam classMethodFontColor #000000
skinparam classMethodAlignment left
skinparam classAttributeAlignment left
skinparam classMethodAlignment left
skinparam classAttributePadding 5
skinparam classMethodPadding 5
skinparam classHeaderPadding 5
skinparam classPadding 5
skinparam classMargin 10
skinparam classBorderSize 1

class Sensor {
    TypesOfSensors: List<string>
    TypesOfSignal: List<string>
    TypeOfSensor: string
    TypeOfSignal: string
    Component(id int, name string, date DateTime, string typeOfSensor, string typeOfSignal)
    GetFunction()
}

class Actuator {
    TypesOfActuators: List<string>
    StatusesOfActuators: List<string>
    TypeOfActuator: string
    StatusOfActuator: string
    Component(id int, name string, date DateTime, string typeOfActuator, string statusOfActuator)
    GetFunction()
}

class Component {
    id: int
    name: string
    date: DateTime
    Component(id int, name string, date DateTime)
    GetFunction()
}

class ComponentContext {
    Components: List<Component>
    ComponentContext()
}

class ComponentStore {
    container: ComponentContext
    ComponentStore()
    GetComponent(id int) Component
}

class Proxy {
    components: List<Component>
    componentStore: ComponentStore
    Proxy()
    GetComponent(id int) Component
}

class IComponent {
    GetComponent(id int) Component
}

class Program {
    Main(args[] string)
}

Sensor --|> Component
Actuator --|> Component
ComponentContext o-- Sensor
ComponentContext o-- Actuator
ComponentContext o-- Component
ComponentStore -- ComponentContext
Proxy -- ComponentStore
Proxy --|> IComponent
Program -- Proxy
Program -- IComponent
@enduml
```
